name: weak-domain-mismatch
description: Frontend engineer resume vs a senior mechanical engineering role — should score low.
resume: Jane Doe — Senior Frontend Engineer. 7 years building React + TypeScript web apps, design systems, and CI/CD. No engineering hardware, CAD, or manufacturing experience.

job.title: Senior Mechanical Engineer
job.full_description: Seeking a Senior Mechanical Engineer with 8+ years designing rotating machinery. Expertise in SolidWorks/CAD, finite element analysis, GD&T, thermodynamics, and manufacturing tolerances required. PE license preferred. You will lead turbine component design reviews and supplier qualification.
